backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing video clip management with authorization, including CRUD operations for clips, user profiles, similarity scoring, trending analytics, and auto-generated clip suggestions with viral score calculations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three high-confidence features related to debugging and fixing the Admin navigation button rendering issue after Internet Identity authentication in the Layout component and useIsOwner hook.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend source files describing components, hooks, and configuration files with focus on admin authentication, clip management, and UI functionality.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining custom OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes with design tokens for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with title "Beast Clipping" and root div mounting point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component with routing, authentication flow, profile setup for new users, admin panel access control, and state management for video clips and AI-generated suggestions.
Debug panel component displaying authentication state, admin status, principal comparisons, and backend initialization status with copy-to-clipboard functionality and refresh capabilities for troubleshooting admin access issues.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays errors in the admin panel with detailed error messages, stack traces, and recovery options.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component displaying statistics (total clips, trending analytics) with a collapsible debug panel and error handling with retry functionality.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Card component displaying a video clip with thumbnail, title, duration, viral score badge, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Displays a scrollable list of saved video clips using ClipCard components, with loading states and empty state messaging.
Shows either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending viral clips with viral scores, timestamps, and buttons to use suggested clips.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for creating video clips with timestamp inputs (start/end), title field, validation, and save functionality that supports pre-filling from suggestions or selected clips.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header, footer, and navigation that handles Internet Identity authentication and conditionally displays admin controls based on user ownership status.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Profile setup form component that collects user name and email, validates input, and saves the profile data (currently concatenating name and email as a workaround).
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component for entering YouTube URLs with validation, video loading, and an AI clip generation button that triggers automatic clip suggestions.
Badge component that displays a viral score (0-100) with color-coded styling and icons indicating high, medium, or low viral potential.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Simple YouTube video player component that embeds an iframe with the provided video ID in a responsive 16:9 aspect ratio card.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors, and invalidates dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDebug.ts: Hook that fetches admin debug information including current principal, admin status, and admin principals list (with placeholder data until backend method is implemented).
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook that fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clips analytics from the backend actor.
Hook that provides AI-powered clip generation functionality, currently using mock data but designed to integrate with real AI services through the backend in the future.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Custom hook for creating video clips with viral score calculation based on duration (15-60s ideal) and title engagement factors. Uses React Query mutation to save clips via the actor and invalidates related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Fetches all video clips and provides deletion functionality using React Query. Tracks deletion state per clip and invalidates the clips query cache after successful deletion.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Manages clip timestamp state (start/end minutes/seconds) with validation, formatting, and conversion utilities. Provides helpers to validate time ranges, format display strings, and convert between seconds and minute:second format.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP login/logout. Creates and manages AuthClient with configurable options, handles identity persistence, and exposes login status states.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Checks if the current user is an admin by calling backend isCallerAdmin() method. Includes extensive logging for debugging and caches the result for 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides hooks for fetching and saving user profiles via React Query. Includes logging for debugging and invalidates related queries (currentUserProfile, isOwner) after profile updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Fetches trending video clips from the backend using React Query. Enabled only when actor is available and not currently fetching.
Provides utilities to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs. Supports both youtube.com/watch and youtu.be short URL formats.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes. Defines color tokens for UI components including primary, secondary, accent, destructive, and chart colors using oklch color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component. Creates QueryClient instance and wraps the app with necessary context providers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for parsing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing. Includes special handling for secret parameters that are stored in sessionStorage and removed from the URL after extraction.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, container settings, custom animations for accordions, Inter font family, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for a YouTube video clipping application at version 89, documenting architectural notes about admin authentication transitions, known issues with admin panel rendering and navigation, and a comprehensive list of existing features including video URL input, clip selection, AI suggestions, and Internet Identity authentication.
